briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — NASDAQ unchanged, S&P 500 down a modest 0.3% — a classic neutral session with no clear directional catalyst. While we have $677 in cash and four open slots, strategy memory is clear: don't deploy capital on neutral days without a risk-on signal. Top candidates like VNET, RAPP, ANET, and NVDA all score 95 and show strong MACD/RSI signals, but none have a volume surge confirming institutional participation. Holding dry powder for the first genuine risk-on day.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to keeping cash reserves available so you can act decisively when a high-conviction opportunity appears. Rather than rushing to invest idle cash on a dull market day, disciplined investors wait for a clear risk-on signal — like a strong NASDAQ rally — before deploying capital. The cost of waiting a day or two is small compared to entering a position at the wrong time.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）是投資術語，指保留現金儲備以便在最佳時機果斷出手。有紀律的投資者不會因為手上有閒置現金就急著在平淡的市場日入場，而是等待明確的風險偏好訊號——例如那斯達克強勁上漲——才部署資金。多等一兩天的機會成本遠小於在錯誤時機貿然買入的代價。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on Wednesday as investors adopted a wait-and-see posture ahead of upcoming economic data. The NASDAQ closed essentially flat while the S&P 500 edged down 0.3%, reflecting a lack of strong catalysts to push markets in either direction. Trading volume was light, typical of a consolidation session where neither bulls nor bears had conviction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股周三整體橫向整理，投資人靜待即將公布的經濟數據，市場缺乏明確方向。那斯達克指數幾乎持平，標普500小幅下跌0.3%，反映出多空雙方均無強烈做多或做空的意願。成交量清淡，典型的盤整格局，市場正在蓄勢待發，等待下一個具方向性的觸媒出現。
